sentences.text: Thank you for calling National property management Associates. The office is now closed our normal hours of operation are Monday through Friday from nine, AM until five PM eastern time.

If you know your party's extension you may dial it now or press pound to search our directory by name. If you would like to leave a general by using the keys on your touch tone phone. Please enter the first or last name of the party you wish to reach press Star at anytime to return to the main menu. Transferring to Scott Michael it's.
